knowledge_base_metadata.knowledge_base_scope: Typecode decoding, configuration logic, technical characteristics and selection parameters for VACON NXP/NXS AC drives including liquid cooled and air-cooled variants
knowledge_base_metadata.coverage_summary: Includes typecode structure, segment definitions, enclosure mappings, voltage classes, EMC classes, protection ratings, hardware configurations, and system architecture details from both selection and operating guides

source_registry.short_title: VACON NXP Liquid Cooled Selection Guide
source_registry.scope_summary: Product overview, application domains, system configurations, module types, power ranges, cooling concepts and product variants for liquid cooled VACON NXP drives
notes_relevant_to_decoding_or_datasheet_: Defines product variants such as AFE, INU, BCU and enclosed drives
Indicates modular system architecture and optional components
Mentions IP54 protection level for liquid cooled drives
Indicates application segments and functional capabilities

source_registry.scope_summary: Typecode structure, enclosure sizes, protection ratings, EMC classes, electrical and mechanical specifications
source_registry.explicit_power_range_covered: NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
notes_relevant_to_decoding_or_datasheet_: Provides full typecode breakdown and decoding rules
Contains enclosure size lookup tables based on current and voltage
Defines protection ratings and EMC classifications

typecode_structure.explanation: This part is the same for all the products.
Defines the product range: NXP = VACON NXP, NXS = VACON NXS
The drive rating in amperes. For example, 0003 = 3 A
Defines enclosure protection rating and mounting type
Defines supply, mounting and board configuration
Defines option boards, two characters per slot
Defines additional optional codes and documentation packages

typecode_values.meaning: flange-mounted (through-hole mounted), power part IP54, control part IP21
flange-mounted (through-hole mounted), power part IP54, control part IP00
complies with the category C1 of standard IEC/EN 61800-3 + A1, 1st environment, and nominal voltage less than 1000 V
complies with the category C2 of standard IEC/EN 61800-3 + A1, fixed installations, and nominal voltage less than 1000 V
complies with the category C3 of standard IEC/EN 61800-3 + A1, 2nd environment, and nominal voltage less than 1000 V
complies with the standard IEC/EN 61800-3 + A1 when used in IT networks (C4)
no EMC emission protection. An external EMC filter is necessary

exclusions: NOT AVAILABLE for 525–690 V in the listed typecode definition

typecode_values.meaning: FR10 to 11 standalone with main switch and DC-link terminals
DC link connectors and input switch UL
separate IP54 (UL Type 12) control box, standard boards, fiber connection
separate IP54 (UL Type 12) control box, coated boards, fiber connection
separate IP00 control box, standard boards
separate IP00 control box, coated boards

typecode_values.notes: 2 characters for each slot. 00 = the slot is not used

mapping_rules.mapping_logic_from_documents: The numeric code (2,5,6) directly maps to voltage ranges defined in type code table
Use nominal current code and mains voltage code together to lookup enclosure size in enclosure size tables

constraints.exact_rule: Code 2 (internal brake chopper and resistor) available only for 208–240 V (FR4–FR6) and 380–500 V (FR4–FR6)
Certain supply codes only available for specific frame sizes (e.g., B only for FR8–FR11)

family_detection_rules: If typecode contains NXP or NXS prefix → VACON NX family
fallback_rules: If lookup not possible → NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
app_resolution_model.unavailable_value_marker: NOT FOUND IN THE UPLOADED DOCUMENTS
